description: Create a scroll-pinned animation between the Hero 3D octahedron and the HouseBannerGrid. As the user scrolls: simplified octahedron → unfolded net → separated triangles → align with banners. Then reverse: triangles reform → net rotates 90° → reveals F logomark → full fractal logo. The existing 3D octahedron must not be modified.
title: Scroll-driven octahedron unfolding animation on homepage hero
